landing.introduction: Spec-driven AI development — manage specifications, dispatch to any agent, trace code to requirements.
landing.accountMention: Choose your AI provider to get started. AgenticFlowX works with any LLM provider — bring your own API key.

providerSignup.heading: Choose your provider
providerSignup.chooseProvider: Choose your AI provider to get started. You can add more later.
providerSignup.useAnotherProviderDescription: Select your AI provider and enter your API key to get started.

waitingForCloud.heading: Logging into AgenticFlowX Cloud...
waitingForCloud.description: We'll take you to your browser to sign up for AgenticFlowX Cloud. We'll then bring you back here to finish.
waitingForCloud.noPrompt: If you don't get prompted to open a URL, <clickHere>click here</clickHere>.
waitingForCloud.havingTrouble: If you've completed sign up but are having trouble, <clickHere>click here</clickHere>.
waitingForCloud.pasteUrl: Paste the callback URL shown in your browser:
waitingForCloud.invalidURL: That doesn't look like a valid callback URL. Please copy what AgenticFlowX Cloud is showing in your browser.

startRouter: We recommend using an LLM Router:
startCustom: Or you can bring your provider API key:

telemetry.helpImproveMessage: AgenticFlowX collects error and usage data to help us fix bugs and improve the extension. This telemetry does not collect code, prompts or personal information. You can turn this off in <settingsLink>settings</settingsLink>.
